org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.HtmlDocSerializer.Builder<HtmlDocSerializer.DefaultBuilder>
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.HtmlDocSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Enclosing class:
HtmlDocSerializer
public static final class HtmlDocSerializer.DefaultBuilder extends HtmlDocSerializer.Builder<HtmlDocSerializer.DefaultBuilder>
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed HtmlDocSerializer.create() / HtmlDocSerializer.copy() path.
